name: Simple Paid Test Template
description: Minimal template for E2E x402 payment + OutputSpec testing. Answers 2-3 simple questions without delegation.

topic.description: A simple topic to answer questions about

assertions.assertion: Answer the question: What is the most important concept to understand about {{topic}}? Keep the answer to 2-3 sentences maximum.

do: Focus on the single most important concept
dont: List multiple concepts instead of the most important one

assertions.assertion: Answer the question: What is one common misconception about {{topic}}? Keep the answer to 2-3 sentences maximum.
Provide a 1-sentence summary that captures the essence of the topic based on your two answers.

do: Synthesize the key insight from both answers

assertions.commentary: Synthesis of the two answers into a single takeaway.

assertions.assertion: Structure the final output as JSON with the schema: { result: { answers: [string, string], summary: string } }

do: Return valid JSON matching the schema
Put Q1 answer in answers[0], Q2 answer in answers[1]

assertions.commentary: OutputSpec extraction depends on this exact structure.
